title: voiage: Value of Information Analysis

authors.name: Dylan A. Mordaunt
authors.affiliation: Faculty of Health, Education and Psychology, Victoria University of Wellington; College of Medicine and Public Health, Flinders University; Centre for Health Policy, The University of Melbourne

abstract: Value of Information analysis must often address more than parameter uncertainty: model structure, population heterogeneity, analytical perspective, implementation, evidence quality, and decision timing can all alter the value of research or action. voiage provides a common, maturity-labelled framework for classical VOI estimands and these wider decision problems while preserving strategy, sample, subgroup, perspective, population, diagnostic, and provenance semantics.
comments: Draft for author review. Page and figure counts require confirmation after final typesetting.
